stolen_cake.title: The Stolen Cake
stolen_cake.description: A delicious chocolate cake disappeared from the office break room. Four people were working that day. Security cameras show someone eating cake at 2:30 PM.

kim.name: Kim
kim.statement: I was at lunch from 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM.

lee.name: Lee
lee.statement: I was in a meeting all afternoon until 3:00 PM.

park.name: Park
park.statement: I was organizing files in my office.

choi.name: Choi
choi.statement: I was fixing the printer near the break room.

clues.clue1: The cake was eaten at exactly 2:30 PM according to security footage.
clues.clue2: Kim returned from lunch at 2:15 PM with white cream on their shirt collar.
clues.clue3: The meeting actually ended at 2:30 PM, not 3:00 PM.

ev1.name: Security Camera Footage
ev1.description: Footage shows the cake being eaten at 2:30 PM.

ev2.name: Kim's Shirt
ev2.description: Kim returned from lunch with white cream stains.

ev3.name: Meeting Minutes
ev3.description: The meeting officially ended at 2:30 PM.

ev4.name: Restaurant Receipt
ev4.description: Receipt shows Kim was at the restaurant from 1:15 PM to 1:45 PM.

timeline.explanation: Kim was at lunch until 2:00 PM but returned with cream on their shirt at 2:15 PM. The cake was eaten at 2:30 PM.
